description: カラーミーショップ is a Japanese ecommerce platform operated by GMO Pepabo for creating and running online stores. It also offers an app store and developer tooling for extending shop functionality and integrating external services.
summary: shop-pro.jp exposes a developer REST API surface for the Color Me Shop App Store API plus an npm-distributed CLI (`colorme`) that authenticates via a registered OAuth app; no public GraphQL or MCP connect endpoint was found in the reviewed docs.

surfaces.name: カラーミーショップアプリストア API
カラーミーショップ CLI
